[[File:Snailbound Pack Details.png|300px]]

The {{RewardIconWithLink|Snailbound Pack|orange}} is a reward from ?

You may choose a reward from the Pack!

* {{RewardIconWithLink|Blasphemy Eye|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Cultivation Fluid, +80|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Eye of Horus|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Gear RF, +150|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +100|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Precious Record, +5|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Relic RF, +150|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +3|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Super Cultivation Fluid, +8|orange}}

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
